basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Applications are invited for 1 Senior Project Associate post with M.Tech Biotechnology qualification, last date 19 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job requirement: Field work on microbiological sample collection in coastal areas by boat/trawler, sample analysis, data processing, writing reports and research papers | duration: 5 Months | age limit: Not specified
qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech in Biotechnology or equivalent with minimum 2 years of research experience
qualification.experience: Experience in Microbiological techniques, metagenomics, and statistical data analysis

vacancy_details.details: Total Positions: 1 Project Title and Code: Not specified in the provided details (Project code SSP003729/3244-26)

selection_process: Candidates will be shortlisted based on essential qualifications and desirable experience. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Final selection will be based on qualifications
and suitability for the project. The selected candidate must be willing to undertake field work in coastal areas.
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates can apply through the official Application Link before the last date 19 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they meet all essential qualifications and are prepared for field work requirements.
The position is temporary for a period of 5 months.
The role involves significant field work in coastal areas using boat/trawler.
Candidates must have strong research background and willingness to work in challenging field conditions.
Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated for further process.
No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview (as per standard project recruitment norms).

content_sections.heading: Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Applications are invited for the position of Senior Project Associate under the project at the Regional Centre, Mumbai. The notification includes complete details on essential qualifications, desirable experience, job requirements, stipend, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full details before applying. Download Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Applications are invited for 1 Senior Project Associate post with M.Tech Biotechnology qualification, last date 19 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: M.Tech in Biotechnology or equivalent with minimum 2 years of research experience
Experience in Microbiological techniques, metagenomics, and statistical data analysis
Field work on microbiological sample collection in coastal areas by boat/trawler, sample analysis, data processing, writing reports and research papers

content_sections.heading: Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates will be shortlisted based on essential qualifications and desirable experience. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Final selection will be based on qualifications, research experience, performance in the interview, and suitability for the project. The selected candidate must be willing to undertake field work in coastal areas.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates can apply through the official Application Link before the last date 19 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they meet all essential qualifications and are prepared for field work requirements. The position is temporary for a period of 5 months. The role involves significant field work in coastal areas using boat/trawler. Candidates must have strong research background and willingness to work in challenging field conditions. Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated for further process. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview (as per standard project recruitment norms).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online application is 19 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend for Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The monthly stipend is Rs. 42,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for Senior Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have M.Tech in Biotechnology or equivalent with a minimum of 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Senior Project Associate?
faq.answer: There is 1 position available.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the Senior Project Associate contract?
faq.answer: The position is required to be filled for a period of 5 months.

faq.question: Q6. What experience is desirable for this Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Experience in Microbiological techniques, metagenomics, and statistical data analysis is highly desirable.

faq.question: Q7. What does the job of Senior Project Associate involve?
faq.answer: The role includes field work for microbiological sample collection in coastal areas by boat/trawler, sample analysis, data processing, and writing reports & research papers.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Senior Project Associate position posted?
faq.answer: The position is posted at the Regional Centre, Mumbai.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for Senior Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the vacancy number for this Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The vacancy number is SSP003729/3244-26.
